title: eugenia zeylanica
intro: Eugenia zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon olive or Sri Lankan olive, is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the myrtle family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Eugenia zeylanica has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving gastrointestinal issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
